title: Write a Product Description for an E-commerce Site
scenario: Craft a product description for a new smartwatch that fits within a 200-word limit, highlights its key features, and appeals to customers who value fitness and style. The description should be concise, informative, and persuasive.
constraints: Must highlight the watch's key features
Must appeal to customers who value fitness and style

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the product description meets the word limit.
Evaluate the tone of the description to ensure it is friendly, informative, and persuasive.
Assess if the description accurately and effectively showcases the watch's key features.
